name_en: 【Haiyuan Out-of-Stock Exclusive】83694 Blue Mini Bumbag. This Mini Bumbag from the LV Gradient series features a Monogram embossed rendering of gradient summer colors on Monogram Empreinte leather. The trendy design features a zippered main compartment and a Louis Vuitton leather tag on the front pocket. Versatile with removable chain and adjustable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it crossbody or on the shoulder. Dimensions: 17x12x9.5cm
